category_sources: Official homepage says DavMail is an Exchange and Office 365 gateway exposing POP, IMAP, SMTP, Caldav, Carddav, and LDAP.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses DavMail.
Official homepage heading uses DavMail at https://davmail.sourceforge.net/.
docs_sources: Official Getting Started page documents DavMail configuration parameters.
Official homepage navigation contains DavMail Setup, Getting Started, FAQ, Server Setup, and client setup pages.
repo_sources: GitHub README says the main project site is davmail.sourceforge.net and the repository is synchronized with the main Subversion repository for contributions.
Official homepage quick links include GitHub repo pointing to https://github.com/mguessan/davmail.
tags_sources: GitHub repository topics include ldap, caldav, imap, gateway, exchange, smtp, pop3, carddav, office365.
Official homepage describes DavMail as a POP/IMAP/SMTP/Caldav/Carddav/LDAP Exchange and Office 365 gateway.
